title: calophyllum balansae
intro: Calophyllum balansae, also known as Calophyllum balansae, is a plant species from the family Calophyllaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly the oil extracted from its seeds, which has been traditionally used in herbal medicine. The oil of Calophyllum balansae is rich in anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, offering health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant is often prepared into herbal supplements, topical creams, and essential oils, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
